note: seq=119: WEBSITE CROSS-REF enricher ($0,no-API,on-box). Pass A: intra-DB name_norm+city cross-ref -- website-LESS records inherit the website of a duplicate/related record that already has one (entity-resolution website fill; works NOW). Pass B: OSM/Overture website/contact:website tags from source_record payloads (lights up when OSM/Overture POIs are imported). Measures website% before->after -> osm-xref.json. The keyless M4/M5 flopped (15 sites); this targets the real overlap. True Overpass/Overture POI ingestion (expand the match pool) is the next data step. Verified complete (81L, __main__, compile). Watcher-register + Restart from birth.

steps.note: seq=119: website cross-ref (name+city entity-res + OSM tags); measure lift.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_osm_xref.py':'ec24fc45a42704fb2f58e4c21390673d6f9c10a2462add847bc9af99b7a99363'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('xref sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS website cross-ref (name+city entity-res + OSM/Overture tags)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=XREF_LIMIT=400000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_osm_xref.py
TimeoutStartSec=900
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=30

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS website cross-ref hourly

[Timer]
OnBootSec=3min
OnUnitActiveSec=2h
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-osm-xref.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-osm-xref.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-osm-xref.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-osm-xref.service']); print('osm-xref running')"
